title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — embed-request.json (Skill 62, U18)
description: Input to scripts/build_embed_package.py (spec Section 14.2, GHL whole-page iframe mode). Records the parent-origin allowlist, iframe title, and fallback URL an operator/client approved for a project's embed package. Read alongside the existing deployment-receipt.json (structure/deployment-receipt.schema.json, U6) which supplies the hosted (child) URL — this schema deliberately does not duplicate deployment fields.

allowed_ancestor_origins.description: GHL/parent page origins approved to embed this project (spec 14.2 'approved-origin allowlist'). Each entry must be a bare https origin (scheme + host [+ port], no path/query/fragment, no '*') — enforced again at the Python level by validate_ancestor_origin(), which json_schema_lite's pattern matching alone cannot fully express.

iframe_title.description: Accessible <iframe title=...> (spec 13.4 'iframe mode has a meaningful title and fallback link').

default_height_px.description: Initial iframe height before the first postMessage resize event arrives. Optional — build_embed_package.py defaults to 800 when absent.
